items.title: Companies may see AI return on investment in late 2026, says CIO
items.description: STORY: "For big tech generally, I think the sense of is cautiously optimistic, cautiously positive. I don't think, you know, the big question about when are we going to see this kind of step up function with AI, you know, as it relates to kind of, you know, translating into, you're really unlocking, you know, huge shareholder ROI. I think we could see that come this year, but I don't think it's going to be this earnings season. I think it's going to be in the back half of the year," says McMillan.He points to Salesforce and its agentic AI offerings as an example of what he expects to see from more companies as large language models play a more central role in businesses.

items.title: Should Wells Fargo’s AI Hire and Emberpoint Bet Prompt a Rethink by WFC Investors?
items.description: In recent weeks, Wells Fargo has joined Lockheed Martin, PG&E and Salesforce to launch Emberpoint, a wildfire-technology venture backed by more than US$100 million of committed partner funding, reported full-year 2025 earnings with net income of US$21,338 million, and continued issuing a range of senior unsecured notes across multiple maturities. Wells Fargo also named former Amazon Web Services and Google executive Faraz Shafiq as its new Head of AI Products and Solutions, underscoring how...

items.title: Army Awards Salesforce $5.6 Billion Software Deal
items.description: Army Awards Salesforce $5.6 Billion Software Deal

items.title: Lockheed Martin, PG&E, Salesforce and Wells Fargo team up to battle wildfires
items.description: The companies announced a new venture on Monday to help firefighters prevent, detect and respond more quickly to wildfires.

items.title: Lockheed Martin, PG&E Corporation, Salesforce and Wells Fargo Launch EMBERPOINT™ to Transform America's Wildfire Prevention, Detection and Response
items.description: Today, Lockheed Martin (NYSE:LMT), PG&E Corporation (NYSE:PCG), Salesforce (NYSE:CRM) and Wells Fargo (NYSE:WFC) announced the launch of EMBERPOINTTMLLC, a purpose-built venture that will integrate next-generation wildfire solutions to help first responders detect, prevent and fight catastrophic wildfires. This partnership will set a new standard in wildfire safety, enabling more progress than a single company can achieve alone.
